creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #3)
Of course the patch doesn't work if you try to apply it, because it's already part of the release. Unless your DEFAULT_VERSIONS is set to the openssl port, your -CURRENT predates OpenSSL 3.0 landing in base, which happened after LLVM 16 landed. In any case, try rebuilding Python itself in case something wonky happened when the ssl extension was being built?
